title: EuroYouth 2026 Application
description: Apply for European youth mobility programmes across study, language immersion and volunteering tracks.
successMessage: Application received. We will email you within 5 working days.

options.label: Erasmus Exchange
options.description: Study a semester at a partner university across the EU.

options.label: Language Immersion
options.description: Intensive language courses with a host family.

options.label: Solidarity Corps
options.description: Volunteer on community and sustainability projects.

options.label: Send me updates about programmes, deadlines and events.
I accept the terms and privacy policy and confirm my details are accurate.

customHtml:
{{script:euro_youth_wizard}}
EUROYOUTH 2026
Rated 4.9 by 12,000+ participants

Your European adventure starts here.

Join thousands of young Europeans studying, volunteering and exploring across the continent. One application, endless destinations.

27Countries
340+Universities
€0Application fee

ProfileAbout you
02
ProgrammeYour track
03
LogisticsStay & support

Basic details so we can match you with the right programme.

Choose your track

Pick the programme that fits your goals.

Interests

Where you'll live and how we can help.

Double-check your details before submitting.

.ey-panel{display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#f5f5f4;padding:32px 24px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-stepper{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:32px;height:32px!important}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step{display:flex;flex:1;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:0;height:32px!important}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-dot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:999px;background:#e7e5e4;color:#a8a29e;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;transition:all .18s ease;flex:0 0 32px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step.is-active .ey-dot{background:#1c1917;color:#fff}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step.is-done .ey-dot{background:#059669;color:#fff;font-size:0}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step.is-done .ey-dot:after{content:'\2713';font-size:16px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step-text{display:none;white-space:nowrap}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step-text strong{color:#1c1917}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-line{height:1px;background:#e7e5e4;flex:1;transition:all .18s ease}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-line.is-done{background:#059669}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-card{flex:1;border-radius:24px;background:#fff;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.05)}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-page{display:none}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-page.is-active{display:block}.mfp-euro-youth h2{font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',Inter,sans-serif;margin:0!important;color:#1c1917;font-size:24px;line-height:32px!important;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-lede{margin:4px 0 0!important;color:#78716c;font-size:14px;line-height:20px!important}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-mt6{margin-top:24px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-mt5{margin-top:20px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-grid{display:grid;gap:16px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-field{display:block;margin:0}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-field>span{display:block;margin:0 0 8px!important;color:#57534e;font-size:13px;line-height:18px;font-weight:500}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-field .mf-field-label{display:none!important}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-field-group{margin:0!important;width:100%}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-input,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-select,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-textarea{width:100%!important;border:1px solid #d6d3d1!important;border-radius:12px!important;background:#fff!important;padding:12px 16px!important;color:#1c1917!important;font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif!important;font-size:15px!important;line-height:20px!important;min-height:49px!important;height:49px!important;outline:0!important;box-shadow:none!important;transition:all .15s ease!important}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-textarea{min-height:118px!important;height:auto!important;resize:none}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-input::placeholder,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-textarea::placeholder{color:#a8a29e!important;opacity:1}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-input:focus,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-select:focus,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-textarea:focus{border-color:#1c1917!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(28,25,23,.1)!important}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-select-wrap{position:relative}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-select{appearance:none!important;-webkit-appearance:none!important;padding-right:42px!important}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-field-error{margin-top:5px;color:#dc2626;font-size:12px;line-height:16px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programmes{display:grid;gap:12px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;width:100%;border:1px solid #e7e5e4;border-radius:16px;background:#fff;padding:16px;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s ease}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme:hover{border-color:#d6d3d1}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme:has(input:checked){border-color:#1c1917;background:#fafaf9;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(28,25,23,.1)}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme input,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom input,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-chips input{position:absolute;opacity:0;pointer-events:none}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-icon{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;background:#f5f5f4;color:#57534e;flex:0 0 44px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme:has(input:checked) .ey-programme-icon{background:#1c1917;color:#fff}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-icon svg{width:20px;height:20px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-copy{display:block;flex:1;min-width:0}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-copy strong{display:block;color:#1c1917;font-size:16px;line-height:22px;font-weight:600}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-copy em{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-top:2px;color:#78716c;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-style:normal}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-copy em svg{width:14px;height:14px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-copy span{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#57534e;font-size:14px;line-height:20px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-check{display:none;color:#059669;font-size:20px;line-height:20px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme:has(input:checked) .ey-check{display:block}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-chips label{display:inline-flex}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-chips span{display:inline-flex;border:1px solid #d6d3d1;border-radius:999px;background:#fff;color:#57534e;padding:6px 14px;font-size:14px;line-height:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s ease}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-chips input:checked+span{border-color:#1c1917;background:#1c1917;color:#fff}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom label{display:block;cursor:pointer}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom span{display:block;border:1px solid #e7e5e4;border-radius:16px;background:#fff;padding:16px;transition:all .15s ease}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom strong{display:block;color:#1c1917;font-size:14px;line-height:20px;font-weight:600}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom em{display:block;margin-top:2px;color:#78716c;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-style:normal}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom input:checked+span{border-color:#1c1917;background:#fafaf9;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(28,25,23,.1)}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-field small{display:block;margin-top:4px;text-align:right;color:#a8a29e;font-size:12px;line-height:16px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-grant{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;margin-top:12px;border:1px solid #e7e5e4;border-radius:16px;background:#fafaf9;padding:16px;cursor:pointer}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-grant input,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-checks input{width:20px;height:20px;margin:2px 0 0;accent-color:#1c1917;flex:0 0 auto}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-grant strong{display:block;color:#1c1917;font-size:14px;line-height:20px;font-weight:600}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-grant em{display:block;color:#78716c;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-style:normal}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-review{overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #e7e5e4;border-radius:16px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-review div{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;padding:12px 16px;color:#78716c;font-size:14px;line-height:20px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-review div:nth-child(even){background:#fafaf9}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-review strong{color:#1c1917;font-weight:500;text-align:right}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-checks{display:grid;gap:12px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-checks label{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;color:#57534e;font-size:14px;line-height:20px;cursor:pointer}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-checks strong{color:#1c1917;text-decoration:underline}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:32px;border-top:1px solid #f5f5f4;padding-top:24px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-back,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-cancel,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-next,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-submit{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:0;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 16px;font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:20px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s ease}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-back,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-cancel{background:transparent;color:#57534e}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-cancel{color:#a8a29e}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-back:hover,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-cancel:hover{background:#f5f5f4;color:#57534e}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-next,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-submit{background:#1c1917;color:#fff;padding-left:24px;padding-right:24px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-next:hover{background:#292524}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-submit{background:#059669}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-submit:hover{background:#047857}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-next:disabled,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-submit:disabled{background:#d6d3d1;color:#fff;cursor:not-allowed}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-footer{margin:16px 0 0;text-align:center;color:#a8a29e;font-size:12px;line-height:16px}.mfp-euro-youth .mf-form-title,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-form-description,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-success-message,.mfp-euro-youth .mf-form-actions{display:none!important}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-card{padding:32px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-grid-2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-step-text{display:block}}@media(min-width:1024px){.mfp-euro-youth .ey-shell{grid-template-columns:440px 1fr}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-hero{display:flex}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-panel{padding:32px 48px}}@media(max-width:560px){.mfp-euro-youth .ey-panel{padding:32px 24px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-card{padding:24px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-accom{grid-template-columns:1fr}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme{gap:12px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-programme-icon{width:40px;height:40px;flex-basis:40px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-actions{margin-top:28px}.mfp-euro-youth .ey-next,.mfp-euro-youth .ey-submit{padding-left:20px;padding-right:20px}}.mf-form-wrapper>.mf-form-inner .mfp.mfp-euro-youth{width:100%!important;max-width:1152px!important;margin:0 auto!important;padding:16px!important;background:#f5f5f4!important;box-sizing:border-box!important}

customScripts.euro_youth_wizard: (function(root){var host=(root&&root.closest&&root.closest('.mfp-euro-youth'))||(root&&root.querySelector&&root.querySelector('.mfp-euro-youth'))||document.querySelector('.mfp-euro-youth');if(!host||host.__eyWizardBound)return;host.__eyWizardBound=true;function fitHost(){/* windowed layout: no full-bleed overrides */}fitHost();var current=0;var pages=[].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('.ey-page'));var steps=[].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('.ey-step'));var lines=[].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('.ey-line'));var back=host.querySelector('.ey-back');var cancel=host.querySelector('.ey-cancel');var next=host.querySelector('.ey-next');var submit=host.querySelector('.ey-submit');var currentText=host.querySelector('[data-ey-current]');function byName(name){return host.querySelector('[name="'+name+'"]')}function value(name){var el=byName(name);return el&&el.value?String(el.value).trim():''}function checked(name){return !!host.querySelector('input[name="'+name+'"]:checked')}function checkedLabels(name){return [].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('input[name="'+name+'"]:checked')).map(function(el){var label=el.closest('label');var span=label&&label.querySelector('span:last-child, span');return span?span.textContent.trim():el.value})}function emailOk(){var v=value('email');return v.indexOf('@')>0&&v.lastIndexOf('.')>v.indexOf('@')+1}function canProceed(){if(current===0)return !!(value('first_name')&&value('last_name')&&emailOk()&&value('country'));if(current===1)return checked('programme')&&value('start_month');if(current===2)return checked('accommodation');return checked('terms')}function programmeLabel(){var map={erasmus:'Erasmus Exchange',language:'Language Immersion',volunteer:'Solidarity Corps'};var el=host.querySelector('input[name="programme"]:checked');return el?map[el.value]||el.value:'\u2014'}function accommodationLabel(){var map={host:'Host family',dorm:'Student dorm',shared:'Shared flat'};var el=host.querySelector('input[name="accommodation"]:checked');return el?map[el.value]||el.value:'\u2014'}function setText(sel,text){var el=host.querySelector(sel);if(el)el.textContent=text}function updateSummary(){setText('[data-ey-summary="name"]',(value('first_name')+' '+value('last_name')).trim()||'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="email"]',value('email')||'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="country"]',value('country')||'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="programme"]',programmeLabel());setText('[data-ey-summary="duration"]',(value('duration')||'3')+' months');setText('[data-ey-summary="start"]',value('start_month')?(value('start_month')+' 2026'):'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="accommodation"]',accommodationLabel());var ints=checkedLabels('interests');setText('[data-ey-summary="interests"]',ints.length?ints.join(', '):'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="grant"]',checked('scholarship')?'Requested':'No');var mot=byName('motivation');var cnt=host.querySelector('[data-ey-count]');if(mot&&cnt)cnt.textContent=String((mot.value||'').length)}function show(i){current=Math.max(0,Math.min(i,pages.length-1));pages.forEach(function(p,idx){p.classList.toggle('is-active',idx===current)});steps.forEach(function(s,idx){s.classList.toggle('is-active',idx===current);s.classList.toggle('is-done',idx<current)});lines.forEach(function(l,idx){l.classList.toggle('is-done',idx<current)});if(back)back.hidden=current===0;if(cancel)cancel.hidden=current!==0;if(next){next.hidden=current===pages.length-1;next.disabled=!canProceed()}if(submit){submit.hidden=current!==pages.length-1;submit.disabled=!canProceed()}if(currentText)currentText.textContent=String(current+1);updateSummary();fitHost();setTimeout(function(){window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize'))},0)}host.addEventListener('input',function(){show(current)});host.addEventListener('change',function(){show(current)});if(next)next.addEventListener('click',function(){if(canProceed())show(current+1)});if(back)back.addEventListener('click',function(){show(current-1)});show(0)})(window.__mfCurrentScriptRoot||document);

EUROYOUTH 2026
Rated 4.9 by 12,000+ participants

Your European adventure starts here.

Join thousands of young Europeans studying, volunteering and exploring across the continent. One application, endless destinations.

customScripts.euro_youth_wizard: (function(root){var host=(root&&root.closest&&root.closest('.mfp-euro-youth'))||(root&&root.querySelector&&root.querySelector('.mfp-euro-youth'))||document.querySelector('.mfp-euro-youth');if(!host||host.__eyWizardBound)return;host.__eyWizardBound=true;function fitHost(){/* windowed layout: no full-bleed overrides */}fitHost();var current=0;var pages=[].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('.ey-page'));var steps=[].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('.ey-step'));var lines=[].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('.ey-line'));var back=host.querySelector('.ey-back');var cancel=host.querySelector('.ey-cancel');var next=host.querySelector('.ey-next');var submit=host.querySelector('.ey-submit');var currentText=host.querySelector('[data-ey-current]');function byName(name){return host.querySelector('[name="'+name+'"]')}function value(name){var el=byName(name);return el&&el.value?String(el.value).trim():''}function checked(name){return !!host.querySelector('input[name="'+name+'"]:checked')}function checkedLabels(name){return [].slice.call(host.querySelectorAll('input[name="'+name+'"]:checked')).map(function(el){var label=el.closest('label');var span=label&&label.querySelector('span:last-child, span');return span?span.textContent.trim():el.value})}function emailOk(){var v=value('email');return v.indexOf('@')>0&&v.lastIndexOf('.')>v.indexOf('@')+1}function canProceed(){if(current===0)return !!(value('first_name')&&value('last_name')&&emailOk()&&value('country'));if(current===1)return checked('programme')&&value('start_month');if(current===2)return checked('accommodation');return checked('terms')}function programmeLabel(){var map={erasmus:'Erasmus Exchange',language:'Language Immersion',volunteer:'Solidarity Corps'};var el=host.querySelector('input[name="programme"]:checked');return el?map[el.value]||el.value:'\u2014'}function accommodationLabel(){var map={host:'Host family',dorm:'Student dorm',shared:'Shared flat'};var el=host.querySelector('input[name="accommodation"]:checked');return el?map[el.value]||el.value:'\u2014'}function setText(sel,text){var el=host.querySelector(sel);if(el)el.textContent=text}function updateSummary(){setText('[data-ey-summary="name"]',(value('first_name')+' '+value('last_name')).trim()||'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="email"]',value('email')||'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="country"]',value('country')||'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="programme"]',programmeLabel());setText('[data-ey-summary="duration"]',(value('duration')||'3')+' months');setText('[data-ey-summary="start"]',value('start_month')?(value('start_month')+' 2026'):'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="accommodation"]',accommodationLabel());var ints=checkedLabels('interests');setText('[data-ey-summary="interests"]',ints.length?ints.join(', '):'\u2014');setText('[data-ey-summary="grant"]',checked('scholarship')?'Requested':'No');var mot=byName('motivation');var cnt=host.querySelector('[data-ey-count]');if(mot&&cnt)cnt.textContent=String((mot.value||'').length)}function show(i){current=Math.max(0,Math.min(i,pages.length-1));pages.forEach(function(p,idx){p.classList.toggle('is-active',idx===current)});steps.forEach(function(s,idx){s.classList.toggle('is-active',idx===current);s.classList.toggle('is-done',idx<current)});lines.forEach(function(l,idx){l.classList.toggle('is-done',idx<current)});if(back)back.hidden=current===0;if(cancel)cancel.hidden=current!==0;if(next){next.hidden=current===pages.length-1;next.disabled=!canProceed()}if(submit){submit.hidden=current!==pages.length-1;submit.disabled=!canProceed()}if(currentText)currentText.textContent=String(current+1);updateSummary();fitHost();setTimeout(function(){window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize'))},0)}host.addEventListener('input',function(){show(current)});host.addEventListener('change',function(){show(current)});if(next)next.addEventListener('click',function(){if(canProceed())show(current+1)});if(back)back.addEventListener('click',function(){show(current-1)});show(0)})(window.__mfCurrentScriptRoot||document);
